display.purpose: Page titles, section heroes. One per view.

headline.purpose: Card headers, modal titles, major group labels.

title.purpose: List item titles, form section labels, secondary headings.

body.purpose: Descriptions, card body, all paragraph content. 65–70ch max line length.

label.purpose: Badges, chips, nav section headers, timestamps, metadata.

shadows.name: xs
shadows.purpose: Micro-lift for active tabs, selected pills.

shadows.name: soft-lg
shadows.purpose: Hover lift on clickable cards only.

motion.name: ease-out-fast
motion.purpose: Default for state transitions — hover, focus, open.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Fade-in, slide-in for panels and modals.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA. One per context. Near-black background, white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #171717; color: #fafafa; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #262626; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #171717; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #404040; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary and cancel actions. Transparent at rest, surface-gray on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: transparent; color: #737373; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f5f5f5; color: #171717; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #171717; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Creator+ CTA Button
components.description: Exclusive to upgrade walls and billing. Creator Violet — reserved for premium contexts only.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-creator-plus"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 2l3.09 6.26L22 9.27l-5 4.87 1.18 6.88L12 17.77l-6.18 3.25L7 14.14 2 9.27l6.91-1.01L12 2z"/></svg>Upgrade to Creator+</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-creator-plus { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #7c3aed; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-creator-plus:hover { background: #6d28d9; } .ds-btn-creator-plus:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #7c3aed; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Content Card
components.description: Standard idea/content card. Flat at rest, soft lift on hover.
components.html:
Idea

How I grew to 100k subscribers

A breakdown of the content strategy and posting cadence that worked.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e5e5e5; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: box-shadow 0.15s ease; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.06), 0 2px 4px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); } .ds-card-label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; color: #737373; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; margin: 0 0 6px; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #0a0a0a; margin: 0 0 6px; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-card-body { font-size: 13px; color: #737373; line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Default form input. Hairline border, ink focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e5e5e5; border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 14px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #0a0a0a; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #a3a3a3; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #171717; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(23, 23, 23, 0.08); } .ds-input:disabled { background: #f5f5f5; border-color: #d4d4d4; color: #a3a3a3; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Link
components.description: Left sidebar navigation item. Surface-gray active state, dimmed text at rest.
components.html: IdeasPlannerAnalytics
components.css: .ds-nav-link { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 14px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #737373; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.1s ease, color 0.1s ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: #f5f5f5; color: #171717; } .ds-nav-link--active { background: #f5f5f5; color: #171717; font-weight: 500; } .ds-nav-link--locked { color: rgba(115,115,115,0.5); } .ds-nav-link--locked:hover { color: #737373; background: rgba(245,245,245,0.5); } .ds-nav-lock { margin-left: auto; opacity: 0.4; }

components.name: Creator+ Badge
components.description: Premium tier indicator. Violet muted background, violet text. Never used for non-premium labels.
components.html: Creator+
components.css: .ds-badge-creator-plus { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 8px; background: #ede9fe; color: #7c3aed; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.02em; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Status Pill
components.description: Pipeline status indicator. Coloured dot + label. Used on idea cards.
components.html: IdeaScriptedPublished
components.css: .ds-status-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; background: #f5f5f5; color: #525252; } .ds-status-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-status-idea .ds-status-dot { background: #737373; } .ds-status-scripted .ds-status-dot { background: #3b82f6; } .ds-status-published .ds-status-dot { background: #22c55e; }

narrative.overview:
Contently's design system is built around one conviction: a creator shouldn't have to fight their tools. Every screen should feel like working with a fast, well-organised collaborator — one that keeps up with the creator's pace, surfaces what matters, and stays completely out of the way otherwise. The system reads like a well-edited publication: clean hierarchy, confident type, no decoration that doesn't earn its place.

The palette is deliberately restrained. Near-black ink on white canvas, with structured grays carrying all secondary information. The only colour that breaks the monochrome is Creator Violet (#7c3aed) — reserved exclusively for the premium tier. Its rarity is intentional: when violet appears, it signals something worth paying attention to.

Motion is responsive, not choreographed. State changes are acknowledged at 0.2s ease-out. Nothing decorates for its own sake.
keyCharacteristics: Monochromatic core with a single premium accent (Creator Violet)
Inter throughout — no display font heroics
Flat surfaces at rest; soft shadow only on interaction
8px base radius, consistent across all interactive elements
Encouraging microcopy; the system is always on the creator's side

rules.name: The One Violet Rule
rules.body: Creator Violet appears on one category of element per screen: the premium signal. It is never used for a primary CTA that a Free user can also trigger.

rules.name: The No-Primary-Color Rule
rules.body: The primary palette is achromatic by design. If you find yourself adding a second colour to the core system, stop.

rules.name: The Weight-First Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy is weight, then size. Do not use a larger size for emphasis if a heavier weight at the same size is sufficient.

rules.name: The No-Uppercase Body Rule
rules.body: Uppercase text is permitted only for short categorical labels. All other text is sentence case.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: A surface at rest has no shadow. Shadow is a state, not a style.

dos: Do use #171717 (Editorial Ink) for all primary interactive elements.
Do reserve Creator Violet (#7c3aed) strictly for premium/upgrade contexts.
Do default to flat surfaces. Apply soft-lg shadow only on hover of a clickable card.
Do use Inter 500 for labels, nav items, and button text. 400 for body, 600 for headings.
Do support prefers-reduced-motion in all Framer Motion variants.
Do show a Lock icon on gated sidebar items — never silently hide them.
donts: Don't use violet for a CTA that a Free user can trigger.
Don't add a second accent colour to the core system.
Don't add shadows to static, non-interactive cards.
Don't uppercase body text, button labels, or form field text.
Don't make the tool look like corporate SaaS — no heavy blue tones, no dense tables without breathing room.
Don't make it childish or toy-like — no bubbly illustrations, no oversized emojis as primary UI.
Don't use border-left coloured stripes as a design pattern.
